title: FaZe Lacy leaves CORE just two months after launch, reveals real reason behind exit
summary_full: FaZe Lacy has amicably departed from the newly formed content group CORE after just two months. Citing a desire to pursue acting, modeling, and other entertainment ventures, Lacy explained his career goals have shifted, making full commitment to CORE challenging.  He emphasized the split was mutual and drama-free, wishing the remaining members success as he embarks on new opportunities.
